name: linkedin-audit
description: Audit your LinkedIn profile against a recruiter-focused rubric and apply approved fixes with Playwright. Captures the live profile using a locally stored login session, scores 12 sections, writes a prioritized report with concrete rewrites, and supports 15+ automated edit operations (headline, About, experience, skills, featured, projects, certifications, banner, open-to-work). All session data and audit output stay on your machine.
